# …≥Claw Mobile CI Matrix

This page documents the GitHub Actions CI matrix for …≥Claw mobile across all 5 supported platforms.

## CI Matrix ‚ÄĒ All Platforms

| Platform | Workflow | Runner | Triggers |
|---|---|---|---|
| iOS | `mobile-ios.yml` | `macos-14` | PR + push to `main` (nclaw/mobile/** or nclaw/core/**) |
| Android | `mobile-android.yml` | `ubuntu-latest` | PR + push to `main` (nclaw/mobile/**, nclaw/core/**, nclaw/android/**) |
| macOS | `mobile-macos.yml` | `macos-14` | PR + push to `main` (nclaw/mobile/** or nclaw/core/**) |
| Linux | `mobile-linux.yml` | `ubuntu-latest` | PR + push to `main` (nclaw/mobile/** or nclaw/core/**) |
| Windows | `mobile-windows.yml` | `windows-latest` | PR + push to `main` (nclaw/mobile/** or nclaw/core/**) |

The matrix orchestrator (`mobile-matrix.yml`) runs all 5 builds in parallel after the FRB drift gate passes. Use `workflow_dispatch` to trigger the full matrix manually.

## FRB Codegen Drift Gate

All platform builds depend on the `frb-codegen-check` reusable workflow passing first.

- **Workflow:** `.github/workflows/frb-codegen-check.yml`
- **Pinned version:** `flutter_rust_bridge_codegen` at the version matching `nclaw/core/Cargo.toml` (currently `2.5.0`)
- **Check targets:** `nclaw/mobile/lib/src/rust/` and `nclaw/core/bridge_generated.h`
- **Failure message:** "FRB bindings are stale. Run `flutter_rust_bridge_codegen generate` locally and commit the changes."

Never hand-edit files under `nclaw/mobile/lib/src/rust/` ‚ÄĒ they are generated by FRB codegen. Run `flutter_rust_bridge_codegen generate` from the `nclaw/` directory to regenerate them.

## Rust Composite Action

All platform CI jobs use the `setup-rust-mobile` composite action:

```yaml
uses: ./.github/actions/setup-rust-mobile
with:
  targets: <space-separated Rust target triples>
```

**Location:** `nclaw/.github/actions/setup-rust-mobile/action.yml`

**What it does:**
1. Installs Rust stable via `dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable` with the requested targets
2. Caches `~/.cargo/registry`, `~/.cargo/git`, and `nclaw/core/target` keyed on `nclaw/core/Cargo.lock`
3. Installs `cargo-ndk ‚Č•3.5 --locked`

## Android NDK Pin

Android builds use NDK **r26b** (pinned). This version is required for ABI stability with `cargo-ndk ‚Č•3.5`. Do not upgrade the NDK without verifying all 4 ABI targets still produce valid `.so` files.

## Android ABI Table

| ABI | Rust target | cargo-ndk flag |
|---|---|---|
| `arm64-v8a` | `aarch64-linux-android` | `-t arm64-v8a` |
| `armeabi-v7a` | `armv7-linux-androideabi` | `-t armeabi-v7a` |
| `x86` | `i686-linux-android` | `-t x86` |
| `x86_64` | `x86_64-linux-android` | `-t x86_64` |

`.so` outputs land in `nclaw/mobile/android/app/src/main/jniLibs/<abi>/libnclaw.so`.

## Signing Policy

Code signing is **non-blocking** in CI ‚ÄĒ builds succeed without credentials.

### iOS / macOS

| Secret | Required for | Fallback |
|---|---|---|
| `APPLE_DEVELOPER_ID_APPLICATION_CERT_P12_BASE64` | Signed IPA / notarized .app | `flutter build ios --no-codesign` / unsigned .app |
| `APPLE_CERT_PASSWORD` | Importing the P12 | ‚ÄĒ |

If `APPLE_DEVELOPER_ID_APPLICATION_CERT_P12_BASE64` is not set, the import step is skipped and Flutter builds without codesigning. Artifacts upload with `if-no-files-found: warn` so the build does not fail when a signed IPA is absent.

### Android

| Secret | Required for | Fallback |
|---|---|---|
| `ANDROID_KEYSTORE_BASE64` | Signed AAB (Play Store) | Unsigned APK with `--no-shrink` |
| `ANDROID_KEY_ALIAS` | Keystore config | ‚ÄĒ |
| `ANDROID_KEY_PASSWORD` | Keystore config | ‚ÄĒ |
| `ANDROID_STORE_PASSWORD` | Keystore config | ‚ÄĒ |

If `ANDROID_KEYSTORE_BASE64` is not set, CI builds an unsigned APK. The AAB path is `build/app/outputs/bundle/release/*.aab`; APK path is `build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/*.apk`.

## Artifact Retention

All platform artifacts are retained for **30 days** with `actions/upload-artifact@v4`.

| Artifact name | Contents |
|---|---|
| `nclaw-ios` | `*.app` + `*.ipa` from `nclaw/mobile/build/` |
| `nclaw-android` | `*.aab` + `*.apk` from `nclaw/mobile/build/app/outputs/` |
| `nclaw-macos` | `*.app` from `nclaw/mobile/build/macos/Build/Products/Release/` |
| `nclaw-linux` | Bundle dir at `nclaw/mobile/build/linux/x64/release/bundle/` |
| `nclaw-windows` | Runner dir at `nclaw/mobile/build/windows/x64/runner/Release/` |
